packages.hypothesis: Birgi tests the same early-mana/spell-chain job without cutting the now-protected medallions, Bender's Waterskin, or Victory Chimes. Jeska's Will is the comparison slot because it is a powerful but one-shot mana burst rather than a repeatable cast-trigger engine.
